name: Mint Vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour vinegar into a large saucepan and bring to a boil.
2. Add the sugar and the mint leaves. Stir to bruise the mint slightly so it will release its oil.
3. Cook at a low boil for 5 minutes, then strain into bottles.
4. When cool, put a few fresh mint sprigs in each bottle for decoration.
5. Cover and let stand for a week (out of direct sunlight) before using.
